chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4617 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA No.19519/2020. 2. For hearing of main case. 15.9.2021 Barrister Zamir Hussain Ghumro, Advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr.Ubedullah Abro, Special Prosecutor NAB. ************* This investigation, against the petitioner and others has been taken up in pursuance of Reference No.6/2020 pending before learned Accountability Court at Sukkur. Petitioner is on ad interim pre-arrest bail and today learned Special Prosecutor, after seeking instructions from IO, has submitted that neither warrant of arrest has been issued against the petitioner nor NAB intends to arrest him in this case during the investigation. His statement, which he has also placed on record in writing also, is made part of the Court order and since petitioner and his counsel are satisfied, this petition is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
